steps.title: Parallel lines share the same slope
steps.content: The given line $y = 34x + 5$ has slope $34$. Parallel lines have equal slopes, so line $s$ also has slope $34$. Line $s$ passes through $(0, 0)$, giving: $$y = 34x.$$

steps.title: Evaluate at x = 8
steps.content: Substitute $x = 8$: $$d = 34(8) = 272.$$ Therefore the correct value is 272.
